title: Woman and four children hurt in two-car crash
description: A man has been arrested in connection with the crash near Burton Constable, East Yorkshire.
content:
A woman and four children have been injured in a crash in East Yorkshire, police have said.
Emergency crews were called to reports of a collision involving a BMW and a Toyota on New Ellerby Road, near Burton Constable, at 16:30 GMT on Friday.

title: Bristol City 0-2 Coventry City: Tatsuhiro Sakamoto and Haji Wright score in Sky Blues win
description: Report and free match highlights from the Sky Bet Championship match between Bristol City and Coventry City at Ashton Gate on Saturday; Tatsuhiro Sakamoto and Haji Wright score as Sky Blues win as both sides see red.
content:
First half goals from Tatsuhiro Sakamoto and Haji Wright strengthened Coventry's position at the top of the Sky Bet Championship as they won 2-0 in a match that saw both teams finish with 10 men.

title: Britain boosting defence on Cyprus
description: The UK has expanded its military presence on Cyprus at RAF Akrotiri with additional aircraft, helicopters and surveillance assets.
content:
The UK has expanded its military presence on Cyprus at RAF Akrotiri with additional aircraft, helicopters and surveillance assets as tensions in the region continue, according to the Ministry of Defence.

title: Report: Iran's selection of Khamenei's successor imminent
description: The Assembly of Experts will convene on Sunday to select Iran’s next Supreme Leader following the death of Ali Khamenei. The move comes amid a joint US-Israeli offensive and internal regime chaos.
content:
Iran's Assembly of Experts announced on Saturday that it would "meet within a day" to select the new leader to succeed former supreme leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, Iranian media reported.
